# Security Policy

## Supported versions

Only the latest released version of Orekas receives security fixes.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| Latest release | Yes |
| Older releases | No |

## Reporting a vulnerability

Please report suspected vulnerabilities privately via email to **divimero.com@gmail.com**. Include:

- A description of the issue.
- Reproduction steps or a proof-of-concept.
- The version of Orekas, Meteor Client, and Minecraft you tested against.
- Any relevant log output.

You can expect:

- An acknowledgement within 7 days.
- A status update within 30 days.
- Public disclosure no later than 90 days after the initial report, coordinated with the reporter where possible.

Please don't open a public issue for security-impacting bugs.
